race.comment: WILD RUBY (3) did well to score at Echuca two runs ago. Decent effort last time out when fifth over 1400m at Seymour, beaten 1.75 lengths. Finds a more suitable contest and can get the job done. I LOVE THIS SONG (10) ran on well to get up for third at very long odds at his latest appearance at Strathalbyn over 1350m. Backmarker who gets home hard. Will prove tough to stop. JOHNNY CIGAR (7) was a flashing light fresh and then left himself with too much to do again last time. If the pace is strong he can cause a late scare. SPIKE ALMIGHTY (2) was safely held last start when 8 lengths away at Mt Gambier. Has claims if he can reproduce his win at Horsham two starts back.
